subject: [PATCH v6 14/20] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic inode information in a CB_NOTIFY event, including file attributes that can be acquired via GETATTR. The patch modifies the nfsd4_setup_notify_entry4 function to include inode attributes in the notify entry. It uses the vfs_getattr function to retrieve the inode attributes and then encodes them into the notify entry using the nfsd4_encode_attr_vals function.
